rationale.R1.2: The delegation to clean up the draft likely includes verifying logical consistency due to apparent mismatches between the claimed Lyapunov-based framework and the described static classifier method.
rationale.R1.5: Reorganizing the structure at the paragraph level is central to improving the overall narrative arc and coherence of the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing the writing at the sentence and paragraph level for grammar, flow, and conciseness is the load-bearing aspect of cleaning up the text.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral responsibility in cleaning up the draft but is always considered to ensure balanced claims.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to the delegation given the artifact's unsupported attributions to a Lyapunov formulation.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is peripheral for this cleaning task but ensures the content remains focused on the described framework.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral but always active, particularly in AI deployment contexts to prevent misuse implications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are peripheral in this text cleanup but help maintain attribution integrity.
